title: belvala lucens
side_effects: Belvala lucens can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as an increased risk of bleeding and bruising. In extreme cases, improper use of Belvala lucens can result in seizures, coma, or even death. Additionally, people with pre-existing medical conditions, such as high blood pressure or diabetes, may experience exacerbated symptoms when using the plant without proper guidance.
